title: Soft Skill Development Program, Workshop Training Program - JUIT
content: In-House Training We have a dedicated training cell with an objective to develop a comprehensive skill set in our students for their overall development, enhancing their employability and to turn them into mature corporate citizens. Jaypee University of Information Technology provides regular in-house training on the following areas: Communication Skills and Personality Development Program Aptitude Test Training on AMCAT pattern Group Discussion and Personal Interview Sessions Orientation Program for different Competitive Exams like GATE/PSUs/CAT/GRE, etc. Workshops for Aptitude Training, Group Discussion & Personal Interview Workshops / Lectures are conducted with expert speakers from Companies / Research Institutes as well as In-house experts for interaction sessions related to their domains. Such sessions are organized on a regular basis to apprise the students of the current career prospects in different fields of Information, Technology and Research. To groom students for their prospective career, mock test series that aims at enhancing the aptitude and reasoning capabilities of the students and familiarizing them with pattern of various placement and other competitive exams are organized on regular basis. div class="small-heading">Personality Development Program This University conducts personality developnt program to polish and groom the students to the ground of personality, knowledge, sociability, attitude and skills so as to prepa them for the written tests, interviews and other competitive examinations. The program actively address the key human resource challenges faced by the world of academia and industry – and thereby help bridge the divide that separates these two islands Soft Skill Development Program The Humanities Department comprises a team of English language trainers of basic and advance level groom the student on language proficiency skills with audio visual aids. The Program emphasizes on practical & functional English for the real life situation in the world outside class room. The objective of the language course is to understand the communication and its importance, Voice and accent enhancement-Pronunciation, Language enrichment & speech- Fluency grammar, Vocabulary enhancement, Speech Fluency, Listening skills with pre and post assessments. For COMMUNICATION SKILLS we work on the Barriers for Effective Communication like Basic & Intermediate – English Grammar, Sentence Formation, Spoken English, Fluency, Basics of communication Spoken English, Accent Neutralization, Intonation, Accent Comprehension, Conversation Skills, Advanced Grammar Presentation Skills Study Skills (Note Taking, Organizing, Data, Memory etc) Memory Techniques Team Skills Group Interaction Extempore Developing verbal & non-verbal communication skills Role Plays Technical Development Program Special Training Programs are being organized for the technical skill development of the students. Recently, a fifteen days Special Training program was organized for the students to prepare them for the different placement drives. All the departments took special sessions to cover the basic topics which helped the students in cracking the placement examinations. Computer Science Department C C++ Java Data structures Algorithms Electronics and Communication Department Six weeks summer training program for B.Tech 3rd yr ECE students have been planned by the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering. As per the current scenario and interest of students, we have formed four groups: Communication Engineering Image and Signal Processing Microwave and Antenna IoT and Embedded Systems Brief Plan for Six weeks : Communication Engineering Week 1 : Wireless Communication (1G to 5G) Week 2: Cognitive Radio Communication Week 3: OFDM Communication Week 4: Control and Automation Week 5 : Case Studies, report writing, viva, presentation Week 6 : Summarizing the Activities Performed and Report Writing Image and Signal Processing Week 1 : Introduction of MATLAB / Python programming Week 2: Implementation of Signal processing techniques in Python / MATLAB Week 3: Implementation of Image processing techniques in Python / MATLAB Week 4 : Implementation of Machine learning techniques in Python / MATLAB Week 5 : Implementation of projects based on Signal Processing, Image Processing and Machine Learning. Week 6 : Case Studies, Report writing Microwave and Antenna Week 1 : Introduction to Patch antennas Week 2: Introduction to Software’s: HFSS & CST Week 3 : Design and simulation of various practical antennas. Week 4: Design of 5G antennas for future smart-phones. Week 5 : Introduction to AutoCAD for antenna layout design. Week 6: Testing of the fabricated designs and report writing. IoT and Embedded Systems Week 1 : Introduction to IoT Architectures , Sensing, Actuation, Application areas Week 2 : Introduction to Software’s: Tinker CAD software Week 3 : Intro to embedded C, Data types, operators, Statements, Loops, Variables and Scopes, Functions, Arrays, Strings Week 4 : Design and Simulation of various practical applications on Arduino board,Wi-Fi module and interfacing. Week 5 : Design and Simulation of various Real time applications Week 6 : Projects and report writing Civil Department Cement and concrete: Fundamentals and applications. Mechanics of Solids: Stresses, Strains, Deformations, Deflections Structural Analysis: SFD, BMD, Analysis of Indeterminate Structures, Energy Methods, Kani’s and Matrix methods. Geotechnical and Foundation Engineering: Soil mechanics and Foundations. Transportation Engineering: Geometric design, Pavement materials, Railways and Airports. Water Resources Engineering: Hydrology and Hydraulic Structures. Water Supply, Sewage treatment and Disposal. SUMMER TRAINING PROGRAM, JUNE – JULY Civil Engineering Department Department of Civil Engineering, Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, Himachal Pradesh, India is offering Summer Training for the duration of 4/6 weeks in June-July 2025 in different areas of Civil Engineering to Diploma/B.Tech students. Click here for more information Biotechnology Department SUMMER TRAINING PROGRAM, JUNE – JULY Biotechnology Department Department of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, Himachal Pradesh, India offers summer training for the duration of 4/6 weeks in June-July every year in different areas / modules of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics to M.Tech./B.Tech/M.Sc./B.Sc. students. Click here for more information Maths Department Aptitude Logical reasoning Spoken Tutorials Program (www.spoken-tutorial.org) . The university agrees to include Spoken Tutorials as MOOCs for practical courses, wherever possible. University ensures that all the department are taking the benefits of the program.
